summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No merge actions are recommended because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight proof, especially Codex /review and hydrated review-bot/comment resolution. #90514 has a concrete maintainer-safe repair path on the contributor branch; #90490 is blocked by active author follow-up and a member changes-requested review; the remaining PRs are independent focused candidates that should stay open for normal maintainer finalization.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #90514 on the contributor branch by rebasing onto current main, resolving the dirty merge state narrowly, validating the session reset/fallback model behavior, running Codex /review, and preserving contributor credit. Do not replace the branch unless repair fails in the guarded executor.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(session): clear stale fallback model state on reset
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for #90514.

This preserves the contributor's original fix direction and credit while rebasing/repairing the branch against current main. The change should stay scoped to stale fallback model/session reset state and the existing focused tests.

Source PR credit: #90514 by @baskduf, commit authored by WB.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/session.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review must pass cleanly before merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Credit #90514 author baskduf and commit author WB in any repair commit or replacement PR body.
